Over the past two decades, I've lost friends, classmates, and loved ones who paid the ultimate sacrifice. I served on the ground in Iraq where too many of our men and women were lost. Memorial Day is a time to honor our fallen and reflect on their gratitude. It is a time to honor our Gold Star Families whose sacrifice to our country endures. This year, Memorial Day will be even more difficult for our nation as we face an unprecedented epidemic and practice social distancing. But no matter our circumstances, I hope you'll join me in taking a moment to reflect, pay our respects, and honor the brave servicemembers we have lost in our country and their families. If you know someone who has lost a friend or family member, I highly encourage you to give them a call today. As we all continue to practice distancing ourselves from others, it's never been more important to find ways to come together. The ultimate sacrifice has been made by far too many brave soldiers -- and we must remember them not just today, but every day. Yours in service, Francis | "" | If you'd like to support Conole for Congress, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, "" | Paid for by Conole for Congress Conole for Congress PO Box: 851 Syracuse, NY 13201 mailto:info@conoleforcongress.com "" "" tel:+13152808751

name: Christy Smith
subject: This Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hi Peter,

For 152 years, an eternally grateful nation marks today to pay our respect to the ultimate act of selflessness and courage. Memorial Day is a time to come together to honor and remember our fallen service members, to honor what President Lincoln called, "the last full measure of devotion."

Under these unusual circumstances, we may not physically be able to stand with one another -- but that does not mean we can't offer our support and love.

We owe to every service member who has made the last full measure of devotion our eternal gratitude. This is an opportunity for reflection, a moment to pause in our lives to remember that the struggle for a better, more perfect union is a charge that falls upon each and every one of us.

Warmly,

Christy Smith

|
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|

name: Amanda Makki
subject: A Day of Remembrance
body:
| [](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRaOm2b14SgxVpymwGHmL29Z&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=memorial_day&n=1) Friend -- Today is a somber time to remember those who willingly gave their lives in service to our country. **The ultimate act of sacrifice.** The very reason our country is the land of the free is because of those brave heroes who gave their lives. We can never repay the debt that we owe them but we can strive to live our lives and love our country so that the American Dream that they fought so hard for continues to endure. [](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRaOm2b14SgxVpymwGHmL29Z&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=memorial_day&n=2) We'll never forget their sacrifice, Amanda
---

name: Mike Bloomberg
subject: This Memorial Day
body:
| _You're receiving this email because of your participation with Mike Bloomberg 2020. We'll be sending you updates like this on initiatives and issues we think you'll be interested in. Thank you!_ [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=dbeaaec80c1645eca398ca7084b16aad&_e=un6QTXLN6kjLsMdJxwaZy0xbQN90X6iPipaqCspgYfT9BVz2q-WeP2KEom4ZHhCiul87kJanLclCM4_v5wFugn90Hx9zMR4DSO0JTXZTBkCF1SyQ8ACl9VyJBcdHAlQgGK_yr5XCW6IpMrjrtkOSUbZIFRcFbkp85UyT4p4RP9jD84ufBIuba1eM6zEFohqzL0-MkMRhfhljgNpZ0dRR1r7-4PHvZTT1W_vhJQXpl8wpHFolzAd9HJy_UVNyKO76CyhtGs9K__zDzDKXk2nErA%3D%3D) Friend, With so many parades canceled and vacations on hold, it's a much quieter Memorial Day than we're used to. As we practice physical distancing, our cookouts won't look or feel quite the same this year. But what doesn't change is the importance of the holiday we're marking together. Today we honor all the men and women who died while serving our country in uniform. Their sacrifices have preserved our nation and protected our freedoms, and we are forever in their debt. If you have lost a loved one in our armed services, you are in our thoughts today. One of the best ways to honor those we've lost is to express our appreciation and support for those serving today and their families. Right now, our men and women in uniform are working around the world to keep us safe -- and to keep building a better, safer, freer world. That's a mission we can all help support, in our own ways. And as the world faces this public health crisis, American leadership in this mission has taken on new urgency. So today, we salute those who forever shaped our nation, and we recommit ourselves to the ideals and principles they valiantly died to protect. Stay healthy, stay safe, and happy Memorial Day. Thanks, Mike Bloomberg

---

name: TX Campaign Update
subject: What's MJ doing?

body:

| | Our campaign may have gone virtual, but MJ's not letting it slow her down!
**[Pitch in to help fund MJ's digital campaign and keep up the momentum >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489005a/7f51f7bc/4e0b3d49/4ef6a812/3477345904/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200525.2nd__1468__&amount=10")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489005a/7f51f7bc/4e0b3d49/4ef6a812/3477345904/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200525.2nd__1468__&amount=10")
---
**In the last few weeks, MJ has taken part in tons of virtual events,** including a Virtual Road Trip across Texas and a Gun Violence Prevention Town Hall with Gabby Giffords.
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489005a/7f51f7bc/4e0b3d49/4ef6a810/3477345904/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-newworkout?refcode=email_20200525.2nd__1468__&amount=10")
---
Plus, MJ's not afraid of a challenge -- and that's why she's put YOU in charge of her next workout! **[One donation equals one rep (you can even pick which exercise!) so chip in now to help her get in fighting shape for this election!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489005a/7f51f7bc/4e0b3d49/4ef6a810/3477345904/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-newworkout?refcode=email_20200525.2nd__1468__&amount=10")**
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489005a/7f51f7bc/4e0b3d49/4ef6a816/3477345904/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornynaca-video?refcode=email_20200525.2nd__1468__&amount=10")
---
MJ hasn't stopped holding Senator Cornyn to account, either. Two weeks ago, he encouraged Texans to enroll for insurance under the Affordable Care Act, after voting **twenty times to decimate it!** MJ put together a quick video, but there were a few technical difficulties... **[Pitch in to help MJ keep Sen. Cornyn accountable, then watch MJ's video!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489005a/7f51f7bc/4e0b3d49/4ef6a816/3477345904/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornynaca-video?refcode=email_20200525.2nd__1468__&amount=10")**
MJ's keeping super busy on the virtual campaign trail, and she's not stopping anytime soon! Help her keep up the momentum by pitching in today.
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489005a/7f51f7bc/4e0b3d49/4ef6a80c/3477345904/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1468&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489005a/7f51f7bc/4e0b3d49/4ef6a803/3477345904/VEsHAA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

subject: I salute you

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Happy Memorial Day
body:
While I wish you a fun and relaxing time with your friends and family on this Memorial Day, I want to recognize the sacrifices made by the soldiers, sailors, airmen and Marines who have served and died for our nation.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-377169-888037-5013370-7c736af6c0-2d7f5af966)
Patriot,

While I wish you a fun and relaxing time with your friends and family on this Memorial Day, I want to recognize the sacrifices made by the soldiers, sailors, airmen and Marines who have served and died for our nation.

Since the Revolutionary War, America’s sons and daughters have fought in 121 wars and conflicts.

During those military actions, at least 1,354,664 members of the military have lost their lives in service to us and humanity.

>From the Boxer Rebellion in China, to Beirut, Somalia and now the Global War on Terror, the men and women who sacrificed their lives in service to our nation are forever deserving of our respect, our thanks, and our remembrance.

Thank you to those fallen heroes and thank you to the families of those men and women who have carried on with the loss of their loved ones.

With Respect and Gratitude,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
